  "claim_texts": [
    "AB 2104 authorizes the California Community Colleges to establish a pilot program to allow community college districts to offer a Bachelor of Science in nursing degree.",
    "The bill aims to address the shortage of healthcare workers which disproportionately impacts Central Valley communities.",
    "AB 2104 prioritizes program placement in underserved nursing areas to expand access and affordability of nursing degrees.",
    "The shortage of nurses in California is negatively impacting vulnerable communities, particularly in the Central Valley.",
